compiled_state.title: Write behavioral replacement tests for replace-classified Bash tests in tests/agents/
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Read the triage classification from story ca06-e969's ticket comments. For each Bash test file in tests/agents/ classified as "replace":

1. Identify what behavior the original test was indirectly verifying (e.g., which agent script or workflow)
2. Write a behavioral replacement test that executes the script/tool under test and asserts on output using tests/lib/assert.sh helpers (assert_eq, assert_ne, assert_contains, print_summary)
3. Name the replacement test to be fuzzy-match compatible with the source file it tests
4. Verify the replacement test passes

Use existing tests/lib/assert.sh. Do NOT grep agent .md files in assertions.

## TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: Criterion 2 — replacement tests verify existing behavior. No new source behavior is introduced.

## File Impact
- tests/agents/*.sh (replace-classified files — CREATE replacements)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Each replacement test executes a script and asserts on output, not .md file content
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ! grep -n 'cat.*\.md\|grep.*\.md' tests/agents/test-*-behavioral.sh 2>/dev/null; exit 0
- [ ] All replacement Bash tests pass independently
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && for f in tests/agents/test-*-behavioral.sh; do bash "$f" || exit 1; done

comments.body:
AC amendment (GAP-001): Triage results are in ca06-e969's ticket comments. Run .claude/scripts/dso ticket show ca06-e969 and parse. Filter for files with classification=replace.

AC amendment (GAP-003): Use naming convention: test-<name>-behavioral.sh. Do NOT overwrite originals.

AC amendment (GAP-004): All new .sh files must have executable bit set (chmod +x). Use tests/lib/assert.sh for assertions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: No replace-classified Bash tests in tests/agents/ — nothing to replace ✓
